title: MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES - 211info
text: MID-COLUMBIA CENTER FOR LIVING HOOD RIVER COUNTY MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides mental health services for children, youth, and adults, including mental health diagnosis and assessment, individual and group therapy, case management, screening and referrals to inpatient or residential services as needed, and community education. 1610 Woods Court Hood River, OR 97031 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-noon and 1pm-5pm Email (541) 386-2620 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 386-2620 Warm Line Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: Accepts OHP, Medicare, and most private insurance. Sliding scale fees available for uninsured patients. Some grant-supported services are provided at no cost. DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Hood River County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8:30am-noon and 1pm-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located on the Heights off 13th and Pacific Avenues Services: Adolescent/Youth Counseling Community Mental Health Agencies Group Counseling Individual Counseling Mental Health Evaluation Psychiatric Case Management Other Services Offered At This Location: MENTAL HEALTH SUPPORT SERVICES - EARLY ASSESSMENT AND SUPPORT ALLIANCE REHABILITATION/HABILITATION SERVICES - COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENTAL DISABILITIES PROGRAM SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - ADDICTIONS SERVICES CENTER If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. MID-COLUMBIA CENTER FOR LIVING HOOD RIVER COUNTY
